query:
WITH ensure_guild AS (SELECT ensure_guild($1))
		INSERT INTO guild_settings (guild_id, dead_chat_rate, dead_chat_channel, last_dead_chat)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
        ON CONFLICT (guild_id)
        DO UPDATE SET dead_chat_rate = $2, 
        dead_chat_channel = $3,
        last_dead_chat = $4
